entries.source: "Indian history"
entries.value: "Indian sejarah"

entries.value: "Teks Space exploration"

entries.source: "World capitals"
entries.value: "Dunia capitals"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Quiz me on Trivia on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Panduan praktikal untuk menggunakan Uji Saya Dengan Trivia di inspir bagi pembelajaran practice, dengan prompt, gelung belajar, dan tabiat AI yang lebih selamat.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A lebih kuat gelung belajar

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish oleh writing idea back daripada memory.

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Percuma AI Kuiz Builder Untuk Any Topik ialah berfokus way untuk use AI untuk pembelajaran bukannya passive jawapan collection. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Pick any topik dan face berfokus 10-soalan multiple-choice kuiz. jawapan anda one soalan pada time, get instant feedback, dan finish dengan score dan ulang kaji.

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic: practical guide
entries.value: Percuma AI Kuiz Pembina Untuk Sebarang topik: praktikal panduan

entries.source: Get instant feedback.
entries.value: Get instant maklum balas.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Pelajar yang mahukan ingatan aktif, latihan pantas, dan skor yang boleh mereka tingkatkan.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Latih tubi

entries.source: Practice retrieval.
entries.value: Latihan retrieval.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompt untuk dicuba

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia
entries.value: Uji saya dengan Trivia

entries.source: Review weak areas.
entries.value: Ulang kaji lemah areas.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Quiz me on Trivia. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Time travel. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Mulakan mod langsung di Uji Saya Dengan Trivia. Jika anda mahukan format pembelajaran berdekatan, cuba Jelajah Masa. Untuk pandangan platform yang lebih luas, baca perkara yang patut dilakukan oleh rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell mod apa anda ialah trying untuk belajar atau produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Itu difference shows up dalam flow. Bukannya one giant response, terbaik sessions move melalui loop: set goal, try something, get feedback, baiki lemah spot, dan pilih seterusnya action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Fokus itu penting. Chatbot umum boleh menjawab hampir apa sahaja, tetapi mod pembelajaran memberi bentuk kepada perbualan. Ia mengarah anda kepada jenis pemikiran, latihan, maklum balas, atau penerokaan yang membantu idea melekat.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Mod kuiz menyembunyikan jawapan sehingga anda menjawab, kemudian menukar setiap kesilapan menjadi titik ulasan.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ini ialah same habit behind belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself: keep pelajar active. AI ialah most berguna apabila ia gives anda feedback di anda pemikiran.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Mod ini amat berguna untuk pelajar yang mahu:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try step dalam anda own words.

entries.source: Use Quiz me on Trivia when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gunakan Uji Saya Dengan Trivia apabila anda mahukan sesi yang bermula cepat tetapi masih menyesuaikan diri dengan anda. Matlamat pertama bukan untuk kedengaran hebat. Matlamat pertama ialah menjadikan langkah seterusnya terasa mampu dilakukan.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Perkara yang dibantu oleh mod ini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ke mana seterusnya

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Anda juga boleh bermula dengan versi kasar masalah sebenar anda. Prompt pertama yang bersepah tidak mengapa. Sesi boleh menjelaskan tahap, khalayak, tarikh akhir, dan gaya selepas anda bermula.
